message:
PyATS Framework Exception: Failed to execute or parse command 'show sdwan control connections': Event loop is closed

This is a PyATS code issue, not an issue with your data model, SD-WAN configuration, or your network devices.

Please contact Cisco TAC for support with this error.

metadata.title: Verify All SD-WAN Control Connections Are Up
metadata.description_html:
This test validates the operational state of all SD-WAN control connections
on the device. SD-WAN control connections are essential for establishing secure communication
between the device and SD-WAN controllers (vSmart and vManage), enabling OMP route exchange,
policy enforcement, and centralized management. Ensuring that all control connections are
in the 'up' state is critical for the health and stability of the SD-WAN fabric, guaranteeing
that configuration changes and routing updates are properly propagated across the network.
metadata.setup_html:
• SSH access to the target network device is available.
  • Authentication credentials for the device are valid and configured.
  • SD-WAN is deployed and correctly configured on the device.
  • The device is expected to have active control connections to vSmart and vManage controllers.
metadata.procedure_html:
• Establish SSH connection to the network device.
  • Execute the CLI command: show sdwan control connections.
  • Parse the command output using the Genie 'show_sdwan_control_connections' parser to obtain structured data.
  • For EACH discovered SD-WAN control connection:
    • Extract connection attributes such as peer_type, peer_system_ip, and state.
    • Verify that the state attribute equals up for every control connection.
metadata.criteria_html:
This test passes when all of the following conditions are met:

  • At least one SD-WAN control connection is discovered in the command output.
  • ALL discovered SD-WAN control connections have state equal to up.

This test fails if any of the following criteria are met:

  • No SD-WAN control connections are discovered via CLI command.
  • ANY discovered SD-WAN control connection has state not equal to up (e.g., 'connect', 'challenge', etc.).
  • The CLI command execution fails or returns an error.
  • The Genie parser fails to parse the command output.
